applies_when: booking is not tied to a specific container number/CSC plate
reason: carrier specs are reference values; actual unit can vary

applies_when: equipment spec is verified by one carrier only
open-top/flat-rack/breakbulk cargo lacks carrier OOG approval
reason: special cargo fit requires carrier engineering/commercial acceptance

applies_when: reefer cargo without terminal reefer plug/handling validation
reason: reefer equipment alone does not guarantee port readiness

applies_when: tank cargo without commodity compatibility/cleaning/DG validation
reason: ISO tank suitability depends on commodity and approvals

applies_when: cargo_type_to_equipment mapping is used without lane/carrier validation
LCL/FCL recommendation is based only on CBM threshold
reason: actual choice depends on lane, rates, handling risk, value and urgency
